title: The Rephaim Texts: The Shades of the Dead
description: The Rephaim — ancient warrior-kings now dwelling as shades — are summoned from the underworld to a feast.
introduction: The Rephaim — ancient warrior-kings now dwelling as shades — are summoned from the underworld to a feast.

translation.text: The Rephaim were summoned. The ancient ones arose from the dust.
